## Meeting Purpose

[Executive interview with Tamy Ogasawara for the Client Operations Engineer role.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Ideal Candidate:** Tamy's background as a PM who self-taught AI automation for SEO is a perfect fit for the "forward deploy" team's hybrid role.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [**Take-Home Alignment:** The take-home project's architecture (code-first, markdown prompts, JSON schemas, evaluation loops) mirrors growthx.ai's internal framework, validating a strong technical and cultural match.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [**Vision & Strategy:** growthx.ai is productizing its agency's workflows into a Content OS, built on an open-source, code-first AI engine. The goal is to partner with CMSs (e.g., Webflow, Strapi) to provide deep SEO capabilities they lack.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3053.0)
  - [**Decision:** Daniel was highly impressed and will extend an offer after calibrating with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=4393.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai: Context & Vision

  - [**Founding:** Daniel (25 yrs programming, ex-IFTTT/Basecamp CTO) and Marcel (ex-CMO at HashiCorp, Scale AI, DeepGram) co-founded growthx.ai in 2023.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Origin:** Built an agency (60+ clients) to prove the model, then productized the underlying AI infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [**Product Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3053.0)
      - [**1. AI Workflow Engine:** An open-source, code-first framework for building complex AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3337.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Code offers superior scalability and flexibility over visual builders (e.g., AirOps) for complex, high-volume tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=4206.0)
          - [**Features:** End-to-end tracing, agent-driven optimization, and a future marketplace for monetizing workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3337.0)
      - [**2. Content OS:** A SaaS platform productizing the agency's workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3534.0)
          - [**Goal:** Enable internal marketing teams to replicate Marcel's success at DeepGram (25x growth in 3 months) without hiring an agency.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3534.0)
          - [**Features:** Normalized analytics, a page catalog with semantic analysis, and a task management system.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3606.0)
      - [**3. Marketplace:** A platform connecting clients with expert freelancers for tasks like technical reviews, with all context and communication managed within the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3786.0)
      - [**4. AI Visibility Tool:** A data product tracking AI prompt performance, positioned as a Semrush/Profound competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3970.0)

### Tamy Ogasawara: Background & Experience

  - [**Career Path:** 10 years in web, starting in SEO/CRO → Product Manager (Scali, Passei Direto/Wall) → AI/SEO Automation Consultant.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
  - [**Key Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
      - [**SEO/CRO:** 4 years, leveraging a linguistics degree for deep content and search intent analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)
      - [**Product Management:** 4 years, building products across checkout, catalog, growth, and SRE.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
      - [**Entrepreneurship:** Bootstrapped a BI SaaS for e-com marketing ops (built with Bubble.io), achieving a 10x ROI before the project was sunset.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=2720.0)
      - [**AI/Automation:** Last 2 years focused on making SEO a product via micro-apps and prompt engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=3002.0)

### Take-Home Project: Keyword Extraction API

  - [**Challenge:** Build an API to extract summary, category, keywords, and sentiment from text.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [**Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Structure:** Separate markdown files for each task (summarization, keywords, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Enables parallel execution, independent maintenance, and easier debugging.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
          - [**Trade-off:** Slightly higher token usage and API calls.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [**Prompt Design:** A consistent template for each task.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [**Components:** Role/Goal, Context, Chained Tasks, Examples, Guardrails, and a JSON Schema for output.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Evaluation & Retries:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
          - **Current:** A global 0-20 score; retries all services if the total score is \<15.
          - [**Future Improvement:** Implement service-specific retries (e.g., retry only summarization if it fails) to reduce costs and improve efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

### Development Process & AI Tooling

  - [**Workflow:** A structured process for using AI.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**1. Analysis:** Review past, similar projects to leverage existing knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [**2. Architecture:** Diagram the system and make high-level tech decisions (e.g., TypeScript/Node.js).](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**3. Prompting:** Use ChatGPT to validate ideas and find counter-arguments.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
      - [**4. Prototyping:** Use Codex to generate a high-level code skeleton.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [**5. Refinement:** Use Copilot for debugging, refactoring, and adding detail.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:** Discuss Tamy's candidacy with Tucker and the team.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=4393.0)
  - [**Daniel:** Extend an offer to Tamy by EOD Nov 24 or AM Nov 25.](https://fathom.video/share/Dx6a5KiZu5srFi6Fp9Gy_szr-_FJdoXR?tab=summary&timestamp=4393.0)
